calendar.matters:
Petition To Name Trustee To Succeed Present Trustee If He Is Unable To Act
Off Calendar Dec-06-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that there is no appearance by Ms. Wald or the trustee Mr. Shields, that this has been continued twice for failure to provide notice, that there is still no notice and took the Petition to Name Trustee to Succeed Present Trustee if he is unable to act off calendar.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Yolanda Mazariegos. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
